subject: Fermi GRB190517.81 Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias)

(South African Astronomical Observatory)



MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190517.81 (trigger No 579814215, 17h 59m 24.00s , +25d 54m 36.00s, R=1) errorbox  92 sec after trigger time at 2019-05-17 19:31:42 UT, with upper limit up to  17.7 mag. The observations began at zenit distance = 51 deg. The sun  altitude  is -23.9 deg. 

MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB190517.81 errorbox  135 sec after trigger time at 2019-05-17 19:32:25 UT, with upper limit up to  15.6 mag. The observations began at zenit distance = 57 deg. The sun  altitude  is -20.3 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -60 deg., longitude l = 98 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1021627

We obtain a following upper limits.
